subcodes.first_line: O thou who hast fallen into manifold trials, upon thee be seemly patience, with reliance upon the Glorious Lord, and steadfastness [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا من وقع فی بلایاء شتی علیک الصبر الجمیل المتوکل علی الرب الجلیل و التجلد فی
subcodes.subjects: @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness, @suffering and imprisonment, @consolation and comfort
